data.title: Risk warning of Expiration of Preset Certificates on Huawei Servers-华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
data.precaution_title: 华为服务器预置证书过期风险预警
data.creator: h84185509
data.risk_description:
The preset SSL certificate of iBMC earlier than 253 (excluded) and iBMC 663 will expire on July 22, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of E9000 management module (MM910) firmware earlier than 690 (excluded) will expire on February 20, 2024. The preset SSL certificate of all versions of 9008 V5 (supporting CMC)/9032/9016/9008 server chassis management modules (KunLun CMC) will expire on February 20, 2024. After the software certificates expire, the WebUI and Redfish functions can be used properly. Some software or versions will report alarms.
If certificate validity period verification is enabled on the customer's network management system (NMS), the device may be out of management.
iBMC 253(不包含)之前和663版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年7月22日过期；E9000管理板MM910固件版本690(不包含)之前版本使用的预置SSL证书将于2024年2月20日过期；9008 V5（Support CMC）/9032/9016/9008服务器机框管理板Kunlun CMC所有版本使用的预置SSL证书2024年2月20日过期。这些软件的证书过期后，web和redfish功能均可以正常使用，部分软件或版本会上报告警。如果客户网管开启了证书有效期校验，可能有脱管风险。
